Table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

Card of table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

Name

TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

Code

TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

 

T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT_ITEM_DISCOUNT

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

Full_Payload_Orderno AS ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK,

Full_Payload_Entries_Deliveryitemnumber AS DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Discounts_Itemdiscountcode AS DISCOUNT_CODE_BK,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Discounts_Itemdiscountno AS ORDER_ITEM_IDENTIFIER_BK,

Country AS COUNTRY_CODE,

Full_Payload_Customer_Customerno AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER,

Full_Payload_Ordertimestamp AS ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Discounts_Itemdiscountdescr AS DISCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Discounts_Itemdiscountemployeeid AS EMPLOYEE_ID,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Discounts_Itemdiscountgross AS DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_GROSS,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Discounts_Itemdiscountnet AS DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_NET,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Discounts_Itemdiscounttype AS DISCOUNT_TYPE,

CASE

WHEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) IS NOT NULL

AND COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERNO,

Full_Payload_Entries_Deliveryitemnumber,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Discounts_Itemdiscountcode,

Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Discounts_Itemdiscountno,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP

) = 1

THEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP)

ELSE __LOAD_TS

END AS VALID_FROM

-- [remaining technical columns]

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT_ITEM_DISCOUNT

WHERE

(

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP IS NULL

OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) <= __LOAD_TS

)

;

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: Full_Payload_Orderno, Full_Payload_Entries_Deliveryitemnumber, Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Discounts_Itemdiscountcode, Full_Payload_Entries_Salesprice_Discounts_Itemdiscountno

Primary key(s) Target: ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK, DISCOUNT_CODE_BK, ORDER_ITEM_IDENTIFIER_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2 (use COALESCE(full_payload_orderTimestamp, __load_ts) as a reference for record versioning)

 

----------

RLS

----------

RLS v2 add join to MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER to sharing script

 

SELECT o.*

FROM TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT o

LEFT JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = o.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER

AND o.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND o.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR o.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

CKT_TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_


Server validation rule of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

%RULES%


Code preview of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

drop table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT
--==============================================================
create or replace table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT (
ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK TEXT not null,
DISCOUNT_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
ORDER_ITEM_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT not null,
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME DATETIME,
DISCOUNT_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
EMPLOYEE_ID TEXT,
DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_GROSS DECIMAL,
DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_NET DECIMAL,
DISCOUNT_TYPE TEXT,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_I primary key (ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK, DISCOUNT_CODE_BK, ORDER_ITEM_IDENTIFIER_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT set comment = 'This table keeps track of item-level discounts applied to an order on the item level.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Order number / identifier of the order assigned to the transaction.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.DELIVERY_ITEM_NUMBER_BK is
'Item number in the delivery/order.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.DISCOUNT_CODE_BK is
'Code identifying the specific discount applied on item.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.ORDER_ITEM_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique identifier for the order item receiving the discount.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.COUNTRY_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER is
'Unique consumer identifier.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME is
'Timestamp when the order was created';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.DISCOUNT_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the discount applied to this item.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.EMPLOYEE_ID is
'Employee ID of the person who applied or authorized the discount.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_GROSS is
'Original value of the discount before tax or deductions.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_NET is
'Net amount of teh discount after deductions';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.DISCOUNT_TYPE is
'Type of the discount given.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.VALID_TO is
'It indicates When the record is no longer Active ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the Record is Active';

Snowflake


Column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

VALID_FROM: SCD Type 2 start timestamp selected via cascading fallback- use full_payload_orderTimestamp; if null/invalid or not granular enough (identical across records) fall back to technical __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

CKC_VALID_FROM_TDE_HYBR


Check of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

Maximum Value

 

Default Value

 

Unit

 

Format

 

Cannot Modify

No

Snowflake


Column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

VALID_TO: SCD2 end timestamp. Use the same cascade as VALID_FROM (full_payload_orderTimestamp → __LOAD_TS) to find the next change; if none exists (current row), set 9999-12-31.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

CKC_VALID_TO_TDE_HYBR

Card of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

Name

ACTIVE_FLAG

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_ITEM_DISCOUNT
